```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement zero trust security architecture"
---
# Zero Trust Architecture
## Task
Implement zero trust security principles.
## Requirements
1. Verify every request regardless of network location. 2. Implement least-privilege access.
3. Authenticate and authorize every service call. 4. Encrypt all traffic (internal and external).
5. Monitor and log all access continuously.
## Constraints
- Assume breach. Never trust network location alone. Continuous verification.
## Success Criteria
- Every call authenticated. Least privilege applied. All traffic encrypted. Continuous monitoring.
```
